stored_metadata.title: Iris pairwise measurements

dc_config.description: Iris dataset in CSV format

stored_metadata.description: Scatter matrix across all four measurements (seaborn deep palette). Off-diagonal = pairwise scatter, diagonal = per-variable distribution.
stored_metadata.code_content:
df_pd = df.to_pandas()
fig = px.scatter_matrix(
    df_pd,
    dimensions=['sepal.length', 'sepal.width', 'petal.length', 'petal.width'],
    color='variety',
    color_discrete_map={'Setosa': '#4C72B0', 'Versicolor': '#DD8452', 'Virginica': '#55A467'},
    labels={'sepal.length': 'Sepal L', 'sepal.width': 'Sepal W', 'petal.length': 'Petal L', 'petal.width': 'Petal W'},
)
fig.update_traces(diagonal_visible=True, showupperhalf=True, marker=dict(size=4, opacity=0.75, line=dict(width=0.4, color='white')))
fig.update_layout(dragmode='select')
